query:
SELECT 'commercial_assets' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM commercial_assets WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'deals', COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'macro_signals', COUNT(*) FROM macro_signals WHERE title LIKE '%Sprint%' OR title LIKE '%sprint%';
